user_feedback:
can you make it so that my health gains a bit more as I progress? and can you make the UI more centered and proper right now it seems all over the place, and when I do reset with R, the game's proression isn't full reset, execute!

as well, I want there to be 3 distinct levels, an easy level, and medium level, and a hard level. and make sure when I reset it resets the entire game progression, apply fix
analysis:
- Issue identified: 
  1. Player health doesn't scale well with progression - only +20 HP per level is too low
  2. UI elements are scattered and not well-centered - HP bar, grid, enemy, and meters need better positioning
  3. Reset function (R key) only resets gamePhase, player, and currentEnemy but leaves score, gold, level, experience, stage, and other state variables unchanged
  4. Game has 5 stages but needs 3 distinct difficulty levels (Easy, Medium, Hard)

- Files affected:
  1. combat.js - Add health rewards after enemy defeat, increase healing
  2. entities.js - Increase HP scaling per level, adjust enemy stats for 3-level system
  3. game.js - Fix resetGame() to fully reset all game state, change win condition from 5 to 3 stages
  4. rendering.js - Center and reorganize UI layout for better visual hierarchy

- Changes needed:
  1. Increase player max HP gain from +20 to +40 per level
  2. Add 20% max HP heal reward after defeating each enemy
  3. Completely reorganize UI to be more centered with grid in middle
  4. Fix resetGame() to reset all state variables (score, gold, level, experience, stage, meters, etc.)
  5. Change from 5 stages to 3 difficulty levels with adjusted enemy scaling
  6. Adjust boss spawns to only stage 3 (Hard difficulty)
